title: melittis melissophyllum subsp. sarmatica
intro: Melittis melissophyllum subsp. sarmatica, also known as the Dalmatian toadflax, is a plant species belonging to the borage family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues, reduce fever, and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to ease coughs, relieve sore throats, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Melittis melissophyllum subsp. sarmatica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
